CloudSync

Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 1, 2026

1. Overview

CloudSync, Inc. ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and share your personal information when you use our file synchronization service.

2. Information We Collect

We collect the following categories of information:

CategoryExamplesPurpose
Account InfoName, email, password hashAccount creation and authentication
Billing DataPayment method, billing addressProcessing payments
Usage DataLogin times, features used, storage consumedService improvement and analytics
Device InfoOS, browser, IP addressSecurity and compatibility
File MetadataFile names, sizes, modification datesProviding sync service

Important: We do not access or analyze the contents of your files. File content is encrypted and processed only for synchronization purposes.

3. How We Use Your Information

  • Providing, maintaining, and improving the Service
  • Processing payments and managing subscriptions
  • Sending service-related communications (security alerts, updates)
  • Detecting and preventing fraud and abuse
  • Complying with legal obligations

4. Data Sharing

We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with:

  • Service Providers: AWS (hosting), Stripe (payments), SendGrid (emails) — bound by data processing agreements
  • Legal Authorities: When required by law, subpoena, or court order
  • Business Transfers: In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets

5. Data Retention

We retain your account data for as long as your account is active. After account deletion, personal data is purged within 30 days. Anonymized usage data may be retained indefinitely for analytics purposes.

6. Your Rights

Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to:

  • Access and export your personal data
  • Correct inaccurate information
  • Request deletion of your data
  • Object to or restrict certain processing
  • Data portability

To exercise these rights, contact privacy@cloudsync.io.

7. Security

We implement industry-standard security measures including AES-256 encryption, TLS 1.3 for data in transit, regular security audits, and SOC 2 Type II certification. See our Security page for details.

8. Cookies

We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. Optional analytics cookies help us understand usage patterns. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.

9. Contact Us

For privacy-related questions or requests:
Email: privacy@cloudsync.io
Mail: CloudSync, Inc., 500 Howard Street, Suite 400, San Francisco, CA 94105

© 2026 CloudSync, Inc. All rights reserved.
